evals.name: quick-dataset-analysis
evals.prompt: Run a quick analysis on the churn data at eda-workspace/test-datasets/churn_data.csv. I want to understand the data and get recommendations before we start modeling.
evals.expected_output: Should coordinate EDA agent, ML theory review, and feature engineering analysis with unified findings.

assertions.text: Performs exploratory data analysis as first step
Reviews data quality and identifies issues
Includes modeling recommendations (model selection, handling imbalance)
Writes findings to the report bus for downstream consumption
